info.title: Orlo Platform API
info.description: Tenant-facing API surface for Orlo Platform. Requests are served from api.useorlo.com. This spec documents Orlo-specific headers and request shapes; deployment-specific authentication can be layered around this API.

post.summary: Create a task and first task version

put.summary: Update a task by creating a new task version

post.summary: Preview impact of proposed task changes
Promote staged feedback into a new dataset
Create a document from inline text, pre-chunked content, or inline PDF

202.description: Document accepted for embedding or extraction

post.summary: Finalize a direct PDF upload and enqueue extraction

get.summary: List models visible to the org

post.summary: Check a tool call against policy

OrgIdHeader.name: X-Orlo-Org-Id
OrgIdHeader.description: Trusted org context for the request.

TaskIdHeader.name: X-Orlo-Task-Id
TaskIdHeader.description: Trusted task context used on the OpenAI-compatible chat path.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Optional key for retry-safe mutation replay.
